_comment_1: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your real values.
_comment_2: DO NOT commit config.json to git — it's in .gitignore.
_comment_3: API keys are NEVER stored here — always via environment variables.
_feed_url_offline_note: For offline testing, use an absolute path: /Users/you/path/to/feed-digest.json

feishu._chat_id_howto: Run: lark-cli im chats list --as bot — copy the oc_xxx ID of your target group
feishu._identity_rule: Must be 'bot'. Never change to 'user' (auto-pushed daily reports must come from a bot, not a person)

ai._provider_howto: Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint works. See SKILL.md for the full list. Default is Gemini 3 Flash Preview (free, highest quality as of 2026-04-11).
ai._api_key_rule: NEVER paste the key into this file. Run: export GEMINI_API_KEY=xxx && echo 'export GEMINI_API_KEY=xxx' >> ~/.zshrc

_lookback_note: How far back to consider articles when classifying. 48h handles weekends.
